mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT w.* FROM kb_workspace w WHERE w.owner_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM kb_workspace ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_workspace (name, owner_id, settings) VALUES (#{name}, #{ownerId}, #{settings})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_workspace SET name = #{name}, settings = #{settings} WHERE id = #{id}
